author: @jessicabellandy5687
text:
For those curious how such an article came to be I think I know the answer.

I used to work a job that doesn't really exist anymore called an article spinner.

Essentially a company or whatever gives you a document to spin. You put the document through a program that Essentially acts like a thesaurus for every word in the article. This way you can take one document and make 100 or a 1000 variations of it.

The point is to end up higher on search results and the fact that this came up while Arin searched for it shows it works.

If you're too loose with it though you end up with strange sentences... or in this case the whole article.

So for example "whole" turns into "all of" or "entire" or "100 percent" etc...
